caveat: Machine-checked by the example's own ~100-line checker, not by an independently audited kernel (Lean/Coq); the checker itself is property-tested in tests/test_theorem_example.py. The claim covers this one derivation only, not completeness of the axiom system.
note: Files are byte-exact from the bundle; the generated binding test fails if they are edited. Fork explicitly by deleting the binding test.
statement: The committed 5-step Hilbert-system derivation of p -> p (Lukasiewicz axioms A1-A2, modus ponens) is machine-checked: every step verifies as an axiom instance or a modus-ponens application, and the final step equals the declared theorem.
